calendar.matters:
ADDED TO LAW AND MOTION CALENDAR FOR Hearing To Be Relieved From Forfeiture As Provided In Code Of Civil Procedure Section 1179
Off Calendar Oct-28-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Milton E. Franke, Esq., 925/933-9289, for defendant Michael Giannini, Jr., moving to be relieved from forfeiture as provided in CCP 1179
David Butler, Jr., Esq., 650/873-3750, for plaintiff and opposing party Michael Giannini, Sr.

RULING:
A R G U E D and the Court ruled on DEFENDANT MICHAEL GIANNINI'S Hearing on motion To Be Relieved From Forfeiture As Provided In Code Of Civil Procedure Section 1179 PURSUANT TO OCTOBER 21, 2003 EX PARTE ORDER -- Granted, provided that defendant pay the following amounts to Mr. Butler: 1) $6,149 for September rent and insurance premium today during the hearing; 2) Interest of $293.39 by 5:00 p.m. today. If these amounts are not timely paid, no relief shall be afforded. Costs of $376.60 to be paid to plaintiff with attorney's fee. Counsel for plaintiff is to file declaration re: attorney's fees. Defendant's counsel is to prepare an order. (301/JLW/EH) Reporter: Patrick Heard, CSR #11055
